findings.description: PC-001 asymmetric sub-case 'same-note + non-null snapshot is silently ignored' is documented in the Preconditions section (behavioral-spec line 181) but absent from the Edge Case Catalog (lines 615-629) and uncovered by any PROP-EPNS-NNN. Builder rationalized the asymmetry; recommendation is to add (a) a dedicated Edge Case Catalog row and (b) a PROP enforcing 'same-note + non-null snapshot does not invoke parseMarkdownToBlocks and does not error'. Non-blocking for Phase 2a entry.

PROP-EPNS-027 enumerates only 4 sub-cases (a) PC-001 cross-note+null-snapshot, (b) PC-002 parse failure, (c) PC-004 editing+null, (d) PC-004 save-failed+null. The PC-004 sub-case 'idle + currentNote !== null' is mandated by REQ-EPNS-013 acceptance criterion at behavioral-spec line 578 but not enumerated as an explicit (e) sub-case in PROP-EPNS-027. Add it to ensure the property test exercises all defined precondition violations.

PROP-EPNS-027 (verification-architecture.md line 199) and REQ-EPNS-013 acceptance criterion (behavioral-spec.md line 574) instruct the test to spy on a port named `hydrateSnapshot`. The Port Contracts section uses `ParseMarkdownToBlocks` (verification-architecture.md line 143) — `hydrateSnapshot` was renamed during the Revision 4 block-based migration (changelog row at line 42). Replace `hydrateSnapshot` with `parseMarkdownToBlocks` in the two stale references for internal consistency.

preEmptiveConcernsAdjudicated.concern: PC-004 idle + non-null currentNote sub-case message is implementation-defined
preEmptiveConcernsAdjudicated.rationale: REQ-EPNS-013 acceptance line 578 explicitly permits distinct message; the test gap is captured separately as FIND-EPNS-S2-R6-002.
PROP-EPNS-027 (b) explicitly allows implementation-defined message; appropriate for a programming-error path.

preEmptiveConcernsAdjudicated.concern: PC-001 same-note + non-null snapshot is silently ignored — asymmetric vs cross-note + null snapshot (throws)
preEmptiveConcernsAdjudicated.rationale: The asymmetry is rationally consistent (cross-note has no recovery path; same-note has a trivial recovery path = ignore extra data). The lack of a dedicated Edge Case Catalog entry and PROP coverage is captured separately as FIND-EPNS-S2-R6-001.
